description: You are the QA Lead for the 'Mobile App Beta' project. Several users have reported a crash on startup. Identify the 'Master' issue in the project that contains a stack trace or crash log (specifically a 'NullPointerException'). Mark all other crash-related issues as 'Rejected' and link them to the Master issue using the 'Duplicates' relation. Ensure the Master issue remains in a 'New' or 'Open' state. Login credentials: admin / Admin1234!
